challenge.explanation:
Da bi dobio tačan odgovor, budi pažljiv sa onim što Josh kaže o otpornicima.

E-mail navodi da su izabrali rezistore sa visokom vrednošću iz kataloga koji je Sarah preferirala.

Josh takođe kaže da će pripremiti uzorak koji pokazuje da oporni pratioci postoje i da su važni.

Pronađi opciju koja odgovara odabiru i spajanju otpornika, a ne uklanjanju.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Nakon njihovog sastanka, Josh ju je pratio tako što mu je poslao mejl Sari sa ažuriranim sažetkom baziranim na svemu što su razgovarali:

Hi Sarah,

Thank you again for meeting with me today. Based on our discussion, I've drafted a new quote for the components needed for the next product batch.

Here's a quick overview:

Resistors: We have selected the high-capacity ones from the catalog you preferred. We will prepare a sample for you before making the full order.

Cables: I've updated the order to request longer lengths, about double the size we used last time.

Connectors: We've included the highest quality options, as discussed, to ensure the best performance for the new design.

Attached, you'll find the updated list of items. I have checked our stock levels, and most of these items are ready to go. For those that are not immediately available, I've noted the expected arrival times.

Please review the quote when you have a moment. Let's touch base after you've had a chance to look it over.

Thanks again, and I look forward to your feedback!

Best regards,

Josh

Šta kaže Josh o otpornicima?

answers.feedback: Josh jasno kaže da resistors-i postoje i čak spominje pripremu uzoraka.

answers.answer: Izabrao je otpornike sa visokom kapacitetom koje je Sara volela.

answers.feedback: Josh govori o proveravanju akcija, ali nije ništa rekao o uklanjanju otpornika.

challenge.title: Vežba 51
